productDisplayName: Timberland Women Nekkol Convertable Black Sports Sandals
description: Here's a performance sandal with hook-and-loop closure to ensure that you get the perfect Fit every time. timberland's Sandal isn't just for schlepping back and forth from the house to the pool - with a compression-molded EVA midsole for comfort and shock absorption and a solid rubber lug outsole that's designed expecially for traction on varied terrain, you'll be wearing these around the campsite and throughout the backcountry. These rugged sandals couldn't be easier to take on and off, and you'll appreciate the lightweight breathability of quality synthetics when you're out enjoying the wind, air and water. UpperSynthetic leather upper for lightweight protectionHook-and-loop adjustable strap closures at two pointsRemovable ankle strap to convert the floaters into slip onsMidsoleCompression molded EVA midsole provides lightweight cushioning and shock absorptionOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with lugs designed for superior traction on trailsshoe careUse timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes sparkling clean
